title: Astropad’s Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
description: Astropad’s Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad, with low-latency streaming and mobile access.

title: Steam client files point to "framerate estimator" feature in the works
description: JSON text strings suggest performance charts based on "framerates of other Steam users."

title: For the first time ever, Amazon is cutting old Kindles off from the Kindle Store
description: Post-2013 Kindles will continue to work, even if they no longer receive updates.

title: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address the rise in child sexual exploitation
description: OpenAI's new Child Safety Blueprint aims to tackle the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to advancements in AI.

title: No big trucks for little roads: American OEMs say EU is blocking imports
description: European buyers aren't interested in full-size trucks; US car industry doesn't care.

title: Databricks co-founder wins prestigious ACM award, says ‘AGI is here already’
description: Matei Zaharia has won the top honor from the Association for Computing Machinery. Now he's working on AI for research and says AGI is simply misunderstood.

title: With Orion still flying, NASA is nearing key decisions about Artemis III
description: "One of the questions is what the initial orbit will be for Artemis III."

title: Final 3 days to save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
description: Save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass until April 10, 11:59 p.m. PT. Secure your spot at the center of the tech ecosystem. Register here.

title: Mustafa Suleyman: AI development won’t hit a wall anytime soon—here’s why

title: Anthropic limits access to Mythos, its new cybersecurity AI model

title: Anthropic Teams Up With Its Rivals to Keep AI From Hacking Everything

title: Enabling agent-first process redesign
description: Unlike static, rules-based systems, AI agents can learn, adapt, and optimize processes dynamically. title: The Ridiculously Nerdy Intel Bet That Could Rake in Billions
description: Advanced chip packaging is suddenly at the center of the AI boom. Intel is going all in.

title: Hackers Are Posting the Claude Code Leak With Bonus Malware
description: Plus: The FBI says a recent hack of its wiretap tools poses a national security risk, attackers stole Cisco source code as part of an ongoing supply chain hacking spree, and more.

title: Meta Pauses Work With Mercor After Data Breach Puts AI Industry Secrets at Risk
description: Major AI labs are investigating a security incident that impacted Mercor, a leading data vendor. The incident could have exposed key data about how they train AI models.

description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
